actionUnits.condition: Enter platform2 (2)'s trigger BoxCollider (id 606197088, isTrigger=1) with an actor that has a Rigidbody (e.g., the serialized 'player' reference fileID 7425022 if it has a collider+rigidbody). This should invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter on MonoBehaviour id 606197086 (script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Note: current code checks 'if (gameObject == player)' instead of 'if (other.gameObject == player)'; parenting will only occur if the serialized 'player' actually references this same platform GameObject.

Exit platform2 (2)'s trigger BoxCollider (id 606197088) with the same Rigidbody actor to invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit on MonoBehaviour id 606197086. Expected behavior per code: if (gameObject == player) then detach (player.transform.parent = null); due to the same comparison, detachment only occurs if 'player' equals this platform GameObject.
